name: EuiComment
visualDescription: A single feed item composed of a circular avatar or icon on the left, a header row with author name, action text, and timestamp, and an optional bordered body panel below. Used inside EuiCommentList to form a conversation thread. NOT EuiTimeline (EuiComment includes user attribution and a collapsible body; EuiTimeline is a generic icon + content row).

timestamp.description: Time of occurrence of the event. Its format is set on the consumer's side

event.description: Describes the event that took place

actions.description: Custom actions that the user can perform from the comment's header

children.description: Accepts any ReactNode. Renders in a panel within the comment event.

eventIcon.description: Custom icon that shows before the username.

eventIconAriaLabel.description:
Specify an `aria-label` for the `eventIcon`.
If no `aria-label` is passed we assume the icon is purely decorative.

eventColor.description: Background color for the comment's header.

timelineAvatar.type: string | number | boolean | ReactElement | Iterable<ReactNode> | ReactPortal | ComponentClass<...> | FunctionComponent<...>
timelineAvatar.description:
Main avatar that accompanies the comment. Should indicate who is the author of the comment.
Any `ReactNode`, but preferably `EuiAvatar`, or a `string` as an `EuiAvatarProps['iconType']`.
If no `timelineAvatar` is passed, the `user` icon will be used as the avatar.

timelineAvatarAriaLabel.description:
Specify an `aria-label` and `title` for the `timelineAvatar` when passed as an `IconType` or when nothing is passed.
If no `timelineAvatarAriaLabel` is passed we assume the avatar is purely decorative.

verticalAlign.description: Vertical alignment of the event with the icon

example: <EuiComment username="User" timelineAvatar="user" event="posted" eventIcon="pencil" timestamp="on Jan 1, 2020" actions="Example action">A user message or any custom component</EuiComment>
